summary: Parallel review: FAIL (5 critical, 13 warning, 5 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: - `test/cron-tick.test.mjs:6` тАФ `existsSync` is confirmed absent. Import line now reads `import { mkdirSync, writeFileSync, rmSync } from "fs"`. The prior ЁЯФ┤ blocking finding is resolved.
- `bin/lib/github.mjs:257-294` тАФ No changes. Prior ЁЯЯб backlog items (redundant `item-list` re-fetch at line 266, `readTrackingConfig()` with no path at line 275) remain unchanged.
- `bin/lib/doctor.mjs:182-217` тАФ No changes. Prior ЁЯЯб double-read of `PROJECT.md` at lines 189/204 remains unchanged.

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/github.mjs:275` тАФ `setProjectItemStatus` re-reads `PROJECT.md` via `readTrackingConfig()` with no path; silently returns false under worktree/cwd-mismatch тАФ pass tracking config from caller
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/github.mjs:266-267` тАФ re-fetches full item list when caller already holds `item.id`; 2 redundant `gh project item-list` calls per tick
The prior ЁЯФ┤ blocking finding is resolved. The following pre-existing ЁЯЯб backlog items carry forward (none introduced by this commit):

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/cron.mjs:111` тАФ if `runSingleFeature` calls `process.exit()` synchronously, neither the `catch` revert block nor the `finally` lock-release execute; board item stays in "in-progress" indefinitely
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/cron.mjs:124` тАФ `_commentIssue` return value silently discarded; inconsistent with the warn-on-false pattern applied to all three `setProjectItemStatus` calls directly above it

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/github.mjs:275` тАФ `readTrackingConfig()` called without a path inside `setProjectItemStatus`; implicitly bound to `process.cwd()` at call time; silent `false` return if cwd differs (e.g., worktree contexts)

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/github.mjs:266` тАФ `setProjectItemStatus` re-fetches the full project item list on every call despite the caller already holding `item.id` at `cron.mjs:98`; 2 redundant API calls per tick
**run_3 scope confirmed:** one line removed тАФ `existsSync` dead import gone. No tests added/removed. Prior ЁЯФ┤ blocker resolved.

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/cron.mjs:124` тАФ `_commentIssue(...)` inside `catch(err)` is not try-caught; if it throws, the original `runSingleFeature` error is discarded and the commentIssue exception propagates to the caller instead. (Prior reviews flagged the return value being silently discarded тАФ this is the *throw* scenario, a distinct failure mode. No test covers it.)

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/cron.mjs:111` тАФ `runSingleFeature(args, title)` passes no issue number; feature slug is title-derived only with no explicit traceability link back to the dispatching GitHub issue; consider passing `issueNumber` as `explicitSlug` and add a test assertion for the association
- `test/cron-tick.test.mjs:6` тАФ `existsSync` removed from the import. The ЁЯФ┤ blocking finding from the prior simplicity/engineer pass is resolved.

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/cron.mjs:100` + `run.mjs:470` тАФ Issue title passes through to agent prompt with `--permission-mode bypassPermissions`; natural-language prompt injection is not blocked. Restricted board access required in team contexts.
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/cron.mjs:124` тАФ Raw `err.message` posted to GitHub issue comments; can expose local filesystem paths and env state to all participants.

ЁЯЯб `test/cron-tick.test.mjs:34` тАФ `writeProjectMd` helper and its calls at lines 71, 99, 131, 168, 193 write `PROJECT.md` to disk in unit tests where all I/O deps (`readTrackingConfig`, `readProjectNumber`, `listProjectItems`, `lockFile`) are injected. The file is never read. Adds cognitive load тАФ removes the calls from unit tests that fully inject deps.

The prior ЁЯФ┤ (`existsSync` dead import in `test/cron-tick.test.mjs:6`) is **confirmed resolved**. Direct read: `import { mkdirSync, writeFileSync, rmSync } from "fs"` тАФ `existsSync` absent. All four veto categories clear.
